title: arrhenatherum elatius var. breviaristatum
intro: Arrhenatherum elatius var. breviaristatum, commonly known as meadow oat grass, is a variety of the Arrhenatherum elatius plant, a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum elatium include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and easing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Arrhenatherum elatium include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
